tickets.title: Topic 24 — Procedural-memory / self-editing-prompt pattern in agentic systems (2026): how do production agents automatically update their own system prompts, tool descriptions, or skill definitions based on observed outcomes, and what specific guardrail prevents a bad lesson from being canonicalized as a default behavior? Cite the Voyager (Wang et al., 2023) skill-library paper, DSPy's prompt-optimization docs, Promptbreeder, and any 2025-2026 community implementations of self-editing skills or auto-updated SKILL.md files

tickets.title: Topic 25 — Verification-before-completion patterns for coding agents in 2026: what prevents an agent from emitting "task complete" before tests/lints actually pass? Compare three patterns — (a) hardcoded pre-commit verification loops where lint/typecheck/test must exit 0 before the agent can claim done, (b) LLM-judge self-evaluation of the diff, (c) evidence-production patterns where the agent must paste actual passing test output into its completion message
tickets.headline: Topic 25 — Verification-before-completion patterns for coding agents in 2026: what prevents an agent from emitting "task complete" before tests/lints actually pass? tickets.details: Topic 25 — Verification-before-completion patterns for coding agents in 2026: what prevents an agent from emitting "task complete" before tests/lints actually pass? Compare three patterns — (a) hardcoded pre-commit verification loops where lint/typecheck/test must exit 0 before the agent can claim done, (b) LLM-judge self-evaluation of the diff, (c) evidence-production patterns where the agent must paste actual passing test output into its completion message. Cite Cursor / Claude Code / Cognition Devin published postmortems and community patterns from 2025-2026.

tickets.title: Topic 26 — Mem0 as a long-term memory backend for a self-hosted personal agent fleet on Apple Silicon in 2026: what is the documented retention quality on long-conversation benchmarks (LoCoMo or equivalent), what's the write-path (automatic LLM-extraction vs explicit "remember this" calls), and what are the operational gotchas reported by users self-hosting on Mac Mini / MBP class hardware (storage backend choice, embedding-model dependency, latency per turn)? Cite the Mem0 GitHub repo + 2025-2026 independent benchmark posts and self-host writeups
